subject: Your OpenMentor login link
html:
Hi {{mentor_name}},

You requested a link to log in to your OpenMentor dashboard.

Click the button below to sign in:

Log in to your dashboard

Heads up: this link is valid for 15 minutes. If you didn't request it, you can safely ignore this email.

This is an automated message from OpenMentor

https://openmentor.io
text:
Hi {{mentor_name}},

You requested a link to log in to your OpenMentor dashboard.

Follow this link to sign in:

{{login_url}}

Heads up: this link is valid for 15 minutes. If you didn't request it, you can safely ignore this email.
